headline: Chipmaking tool provider KLA unveils $7 billion share buyback
summary: Chipmaking ‚ÄĆtool ‚ÄĆprovider KLA Corp ‚Äčon Thursday announced a ‚ÄĆshare ‚Ā†buyback program worth $7 ‚Ā†billion, in ‚Äčaddition ‚Äčto ‚Äčits existing ‚ÄĆshare repurchase authorization, which stood ‚ÄĆat $3.94 ‚Äčbillion ‚Äčas ‚Äčof ‚ÄĆDecember 31, 2025. headline: KLA Hosts Investor Day; Announces $7 Billion Share Repurchase Program and 21% Increase to Quarterly Dividend; Reaffirms March 2026 Guidance
summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) will hold its 2026 Investor Day today in New York City with presentations by Rick Wallace, President and Chief Executive Officer, Bren Higgins, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, and other senior executives of the Company. A live stream of the event will begin at 9:00 a.m. ET and conclude at approximately 12:30 p.m. ET. A link to the live stream and presentation materials can be found at ir.kla.com.
